questions.question: How many seats are authorized on the board or committee, how many are currently filled, and how many vacancies exist?
questions.answer: The Environmental Conservation Council of the Village of Briarcliff Manor is authorized to have 11 members, appointed by the Board of Trustees (§ 18-3). Additionally, the Board of Trustees may designate ex-officio members by resolution. No more than two members may be between the ages of 16 and 21. The statute does not provide information on how many seats are currently filled or how many vacancies exist.
questions.gap: The statute specifies the total authorized seats (11) but does not provide current filled seats or vacancy counts. To fully align with best practice, the entity should publish current membership status and vacancies.
